allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Mejoras servicios, botón reservar y feed Instagram

- Iconos de servicios: imágenes circulares de Unsplash
- Botón reservar cita: más fino y elegante
- Sección Instagram: feed real con Behold widget
- CTAs sin degradados, estilo corporativo

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/c23a35a66ab8a5f93cde2fbba4f55e32/pages/projects/kattycaballero-osteopata/deployments/def4d7b9-667c-459c-994b-4a2fda908660/history/logs" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YVsgW9O2CNae5IqtItS-3bgKgtIsAl-PmKBXH0ws" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for log in d.get\('result',{}\).get\('data',[]\)[-30:]:
  print\(log.get\('line',''\)\)" 2>&1)

Bash(sleep 30 && curl -s "https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/c23a35a66ab8a5f93cde2fbba4f55e32/pages/projects/kattycaballero-osteopata/deployments" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YVsgW9O2CNae5IqtItS-3bgKgtIsAl-PmKBXH0ws" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
dep=d['result'][0]
print\(f'Status: {dep[\\"latest_stage\\"][\\"name\\"]} - {dep[\\"latest_stage\\"][\\"status\\"]}'\)
print\(f'URL: {dep.get\(\\"url\\",\\"pending\\"\)}'\)" 2>&1)
